title: Become a CVITP volunteer - Canada.ca
content:
## Become a CVITP volunteer
As a Community Volunteer Income Tax Program (CVITP) volunteer, you’ll participate in free tax clinics that help eligible individuals with their tax returns so they can get the benefit and credit payments they are entitled to. Whether you prepare taxes or assist in a support role, your contribution makes a difference. If you are a resident of the province of Quebec and interested in helping individuals file their taxes, please visit the Income Tax Assistance – Volunteer Program .
Click on each section below for more details and review all the information before you register to volunteer.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
